name: Tow & Repair
description: Request towing service, find repair shops, and schedule vehicle repairs
promptSummary: Request towing and schedule vehicle repairs.
promptBody:
## Tow & Repair Procedure

### Step 1: Check membership
- Use read_user_profile(membership, AAA) to check roadside assistance membership
- If member, proceed with AAA; otherwise search for nearby towing services

### Step 2: Get location
- Use get_current_location for precise pickup coordinates

### Step 3: Request tow
- Use call_service(aaa_roadside, requestTow) with current location
- Specify vehicle info from read_user_profile(vehicles)
- Note estimated arrival time

### Step 4: Find repair facility
- Use call_service(aaa_roadside, findServiceCenter) to locate nearest authorized service center
- Consider: distance, ratings, whether they service user's vehicle make
- Use open_map to show directions

### Step 5: Schedule repair
- Use call_service to book a repair appointment
- Confirm drop-off time and estimated repair duration

### Step 6: Arrange transportation
- Check if insurance covers rental car via read_user_profile(insurance)
- Search for nearby rental car agencies if needed
- Provide user with all booking confirmations
